examples: He is not the worst boy in the entire shire, but the cleverest and creative boy.
His father introduced Hill to his stepmother as he said, "Dear, I hope you notice in the entire shire this is the worst boy, who has made me have no other way."
Pray, Miss Eliza, are not the ----shire militia removed from Meryton?
Amicus and Shire teamed today to address some of the same markets that Genzyme targets.
Exactly this same anxiety extends to other shire counties, far beyond the Staffordshire Moorlands.
